THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DWAIN DAVIS' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND; ( PAGE 3, PAR.10 (F) PUNITIVE; PAGE 3 PAR. 14(A)(2)-PLAINTIFF PRAYS FOR JUDGMENT FOR COSTS OF SUIT AND FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGE; PAGE 5(EXEMPLARY DAMAGES). DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C)). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendants Financial Position
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sanford M. Cipinko, Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko, Tel. 415.693.9905, for plaintiffs;
Charles E. Custer, of Gordon & Rees, Tel. 415.986.5900, for defendants;
Court Reporter: Tara L. Williams, CSR No. 13428, Tel. 877.451.1580.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FERNANDO GONZALEZ'S Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant Dwain Alan Davis' Financial Position is granted pursuant to Civ. Code sec. 3295(c). Plaintiff has submitted sufficient evidence that there is a substantial probability that he will prevail on his claim for punitive damages. The parties shall continue to meet and confer on a protective order. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Tara Williams, CSR No. 13428; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford M. Cipinko of Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko telephone number 415-693-9905 for Plaintiff.
Charles Custer of Grodon & Rees LLP telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendant.

Counsel for the Plaintiff did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The tentative ruling was not adopted. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO GONZALEZ' Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendants Financial Position is continued to July 10, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 (at the request of the Parties).

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Lift Stay As To Defendant Dwain Alan Davis
Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Cipinko of Law Office of Sanford M. Cipinko telephone number 415-693-9905 for Plaintiff.
Ryan Birmingham of Gordon & Rees LLP telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Motion To Lift Stay As To Defendant Dwain Alan Davis is granted for future discovery. The order is to be prepared by Defendant's Counsel.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Appearances: Sanford M. Cipinko of Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko telephone number (415) 693-9905 for Palintiff.
Rayn Birmingham of Gordon and Rees telephone number 415 986-5900 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court declined to rule on lifting the stay of discovery imposed by Judge Kahn. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO GONZALEZ' Motion To Lift Stay As To Defendant Dwain Alan Davis is referred to Judge Harold Kahn in Dept. 613. The hearing date is to be determined. The Clerk in Dept. 613 will provide counsel with a hearing date.

Sanford M. Cipinko, Esq. of the Law Offices Of Sanford M. Cipinko, Tel. 415.693.9905, for plaintiff and moving party;
Ryan Birmingham, Esq. of Gordon Ress LLP, Tel. 415.936.5900, for defendant and opposing party.

Both counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Before hearing, both counsel provided the court with courtesy copies of their briefs. The Court vacated the tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF FERNANDO GONZALEZ' Motion To Lift Stay As To Defendant Dwain Alan Davis is continued to March 13, 2015 at 9:00 am. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
